commit_scope: impl(contribution-recognition): merge store-backed contributions into recognition snapshots

local_validation.details: Verified the service fix with `python -m py_compile api/app/services/contributor_recognition_service.py api/tests/test_contributor_recognition.py` and a direct Python probe reproducing the graph-contributor/store-contribution bug, but full pytest/FastAPI validation is blocked in this sandbox because the available Python environment lacks project dependencies and no repo-local virtualenv is present.

ci_validation.details: No CI run from this sandboxed worktree.

deploy_validation.details: No deploy step is part of this implementation fix.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Recognition snapshots should include store-backed contribution history even when the contributor record was resolved from graph nodes and graph edges are empty.
test_flows: Compile contributor recognition service and regression test module
Run direct Python probe for graph contributor plus store-only contributions
